description: A professional services firm needs to reconcile its 'Unbilled Receivables' or 'Work in Progress' (WIP) account at month-end.

nodes.task_description: Run a WIP report showing all unbilled time and materials for all active projects as of month-end.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates the detailed WIP report.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the month-end balance for the 'Unbilled Receivables' account from the general ledger.
Compare the total of the WIP report to the general ledger balance and investigate any discrepancies.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the balances match, validating the revenue accrual process.
